title: HOMCOM Kids Rocking Rabbit, Plush Rocking Horse Ride-On w/Sound, Wood Base, Seatbelt, for Ages 18-36 Months, Pink
features: Fun sounds: Press the ear button to bring the rocking rabbit to life – it'll play rabbit sounds that'll capture your child's imagination.
Comfortable seat: Soft and padded, its high back and sides keep children firmly on this rabbit-designed rocking horse. Kids can hold onto the sides for extra balance.
Metal frame: Tough and stable for continuous use, while the wood rocking frame lets them glide forwards and backwards at a gentle, soothing pace.
Seatbelt and two handlebars: Keeps them safely on the rocking animal – no falls or accidents.
Dimensions: 50H x 60L x 33Wcm. Seat: 26Hcm. Maximum load: 40kg. For ages 18-36 months.
description: From the brand Previous page Make your house, home - for everyone. Fusing classic designs and innovative features, and made with the every day in mind, our HOMCOM collection is just what your living space has been searching for. Dive into our comfortable seating, spacious storage, essential fitness, bathroom mirrors, TV stands and more. And for the kids? We've got them covered too in our online shop. Kids Rocking Horse Kids Rocking Horse How we get our start? Aosom as it's pronounced, ‘Awesome’. An online e-commerce corporate since 2009, we have a range of homeware, kitchen, garden and outdoor, pet, office and car products What brands do we have? HOMCOM, Outsunny, PawHut, Vinsetto, DURHAND, kleankin, ZONEKIZ, AIYAPLAY What's our promise? Each day, we here at Aosom work our hardest to live up to our name. Our goal is to take the convenience and selection of online shopping to create a brilliant buying experience. Next page
